backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes search functionality by making HTTP outcalls to the DuckDuckGo API and returning JSON results, with error handling for blocked node providers.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the domain-update feature (to securelytime.com) to its affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that defines OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes via CSS custom properties and applies Tailwind base styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the title 'SecurelyTime' and meta/canonical/Open Graph tags referencing securelytime.com.
frontend/public/google0e657d46cb230404.h: Static Google Search Console site verification file served at its verification URL path.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the SearchInterface inside a full-height flex container.
frontend/src/components/InAppBrowser.tsx: Fullscreen modal iframe browser component with a header bar, loading spinner, and a fallback panel when a site blocks embedding via X-Frame-Options or CSP.
Main search UI component branded as 'securelytime.com' that handles query input, calls the backend search method, and renders DuckDuckGo results with an in-app browser overlay.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider that manages Internet Identity authentication state, exposing login/logout functions and identity status via an AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearch.ts: Custom React hook that calls a backend actor to perform searches, managing loading/error state and parsing ICP-specific error codes and canister trap messages into user-friendly strings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens, plus a fadeIn animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and InternetIdentity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlFormatter.tsx: Utility that detects URLs in plain text and converts them to clickable anchor elements or callback-triggered buttons, plus a helper to validate URL strings.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based color tokens, custom border radii, font families, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file recording the current version, domain (securelytime.com), existing features, and architectural notes for the Securely Time project.
